query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.email, p.level, p.active
            FROM org.people p
            WHERE p.active = true
              AND NOT EXISTS (
                  SELECT 1 FROM org.team_memberships tm
                  WHERE tm.person_id = p.id
                    AND (tm.end_date IS NULL OR tm.end_date > CURRENT_DATE)
              )
            ORDER BY p.name
